content.full_text:
July 12, 1990

Linda Moureaux  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Ms. Moureaux:

As a follow up to our telephone conversation yesterday, in regard to the aggregation of contribution rules, it is my understanding that in the following scenario, there would not be a violation of the contribution limitation of $1,000.00 in a fiscal year:

1. Two individuals (X and Y) each contribute $500.00 to a campaign.

2. Corporation Z, owned by X and Y, 50% each, contributes $1,000.00 in the same fiscal year. The check was signed by X.

If I have misunderstood this point, please contact me.

Yours very truly,

CRABTREE, KARLEN & ARZOO

Jerry D. Wood, CPA
